title: Insta360 X5
bullets: Best 8K 360° camera on the market
Record from any angle and easily reframe in post
PureVideo mode is surprisingly decent in low-light
User-replaceable lenses is a huge plus

title: Peak Design Travel Tripod
bullets: Carbon legs, packs to the size of a water bottle
Survived a fall on slickrock in Moab
Setup in under 10 seconds for B-roll

title: DJI Osmo Pocket 3
bullets: Pocketable 1" sensor gimbal
What I use for vlog-style B-roll
Magnetic mic pairs in seconds

title: DJI Mic 2
bullets: Crystal audio when filming on a windy ridge
32-bit float, no clipping ever
Charging case that just works

title: Insta360 X4
bullets: 8K 360 — reframe in post
Selfie stick disappears in the footage
Replaceable lens guards (saved me twice)

title: PolarPro ND filter set
bullets: For shooting cinematic in bright sun
Magnetic — swap mid-shot
Shutter angle goal: 180°

title: SanDisk Extreme Pro 256GB
bullets: V30, fast enough for 5.3K
I carry three of them, always
The orange ones don't get lost in the bag

title: Anker 737 PowerBank
bullets: 140W, charges the laptop and the camera
Lasts a 4-day trip if I'm careful
Display tells you exact watts in/out
